---
title: "Art"
---

A collection of artworks I keep coming back to.

---

## Andhra Pradesh

:::{.art-grid}

::::{.art-item}
![Kalamkari hand-painted cloth, Sri Kalahasti, Andhra Pradesh](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/ab/KALAMKARI_HAND_PAINTED_CLOTH_SRIKALAHASTI_AP_-_panoramio.jpg/600px-KALAMKARI_HAND_PAINTED_CLOTH_SRIKALAHASTI_AP_-_panoramio.jpg)

**Kalamkari, Sri Kalahasti**
[Hand-painted cloth · Sri Kalahasti, Andhra Pradesh]{.art-caption}
::::

::::{.art-item}
![Kalamkari, Andhra Pradesh](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5f/Kalamkari_Art.jpg/600px-Kalamkari_Art.jpg)

**Kalamkari**
[Pen-and-dye textile art · Andhra Pradesh]{.art-caption}
::::

::::{.art-item}
![Kalamkari wall hanging, Brooklyn Museum](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/98/Brooklyn_Museum_-_Wall_Hanging_%28Kalamkari%29_-_overall.jpg/400px-Brooklyn_Museum_-_Wall_Hanging_%28Kalamkari%29_-_overall.jpg)

**Kalamkari Wall Hanging**
[Cotton, natural dyes · Brooklyn Museum]{.art-caption}
::::

::::{.art-item}
![Mural inside Veerabhadra Temple, Lepakshi](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/7b/Mural_inside_Virabhadra_temple.JPG/600px-Mural_inside_Virabhadra_temple.JPG)

**Lepakshi Mural**
[Veerabhadra Temple · Vijayanagara period, 16th century]{.art-caption}
::::

:::

---

## Southeast Asia

:::{.art-grid}

::::{.art-item}
![Vinh Hoa, Dong Ho folk painting, Vietnam](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/0d/Vinh_hoa.JPG/600px-Vinh_hoa.JPG)

**Vinh Hoa (Glorious Harmony)**
[Đông Hồ folk painting · Vietnam]{.art-caption}
::::

::::{.art-item}
![Hai Ba Trung, Dong Ho painting](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/44/Hai_ba_trung_Dong_Ho_painting.jpg/600px-Hai_ba_trung_Dong_Ho_painting.jpg)

**Hai Bà Trưng**
[Đông Hồ folk painting · Vietnam]{.art-caption}
::::

::::{.art-item}
![Hái dừa, Dong Ho painting](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/6/68/H%C3%A1i_d%E1%BB%ABa.JPG/600px-H%C3%A1i_d%E1%BB%ABa.JPG)

**Hái Dừa (Coconut Harvesting)**
[Đông Hồ folk painting · Vietnam]{.art-caption}
::::

:::

<!--
HOW TO ADD A NEW ARTWORK
========================
1. Save your image to art/images/  (jpg, png, or webp)  — OR use an external URL
2. Copy one .art-item block and fill in the image path/URL, title, and caption
-->
